item.hyperdamagelib.erosion_sword.toolti: §7Left-Click: Sweeps the space ahead, permanently eroding maximum HP.
§dAttack Bonus: Directly deals §f15.00 absolute damage§d to all targets within range, ignoring defense.
§cRight-Click: Releases a §f30.0 Erosion Shockwave§c to all targets within 6m, bypassing all defenses.
item.hyperdamagelib.void_shred_sword.too: §7Left-Click: Tears the space ahead, dealing §f25.0 void damage§7 to enemies in a wide area, bypassing defense.
§cRight-Click: Forces nearby enemies within 8m to be "pulled in", dealing §f15.0 spatial collapse damage§c.
§d[Equipped with Singularity Energy to shred through space]
message.hyperdamagelib.erosion.swipe_hit: §d[Absolute Sweep] Dealt %2$s absolute damage to %1$s. Remaining HP: %3$.2f
§d[Super Invincible Mode] Set to §fON§d. Avoiding absolute death.
§d[Super Invincible Mode] Set to §fON (Max HP Locked)§d.
§7[Super Invincible Mode] Set to §7OFF§7. Returning to normal state.
message.hyperdamagelib.erosion.wave_hit: §c[Absolute Erosion Wave] Applied erosion and dealt absolute damage to surrounding entities.
message.hyperdamagelib.erosion.wave_miss: §7[Absolute Erosion Wave] Released a shockwave, but no enemies were nearby.
message.hyperdamagelib.void_shred.gravit: §d[Spatial Gravity Collapse] Pulled in surrounding enemies and shredded space.
§7[Spatial Gravity Collapse] Space warped, but there were no enemies to pull.
message.hyperdamagelib.void_fall: §c[Void Rescue] You have been rescued from the Abyss and teleported to a safe location.
